steps.title: Prepare Acrylamide/Bis-acrylamide Stock Solution
steps.instruction: 1.1. Dissolve 29 g of acrylamide and 1 g of bis-acrylamide in about 60 mL of distilled water. 1.2. Add water until the total volume reaches 100 mL. Note: Store at 4°C (protect from light).

steps.title: Prepare APS Stock Solution
steps.instruction: Dissolve 0.033g APS in 330 µl of distilled water Note: Store at 4°C (prepare fresh weekly).

steps.title: Take 12 mL of distilled water...
steps.instruction: Take 12 mL of distilled water in a clean glass beaker. 3.

steps.title: Stir gently until the mixture is homogeneous
steps.instruction: Stir gently until the mixture is homogeneous.

steps.title: Add Initiators and Mix
steps.instruction: 4.1. Add 330 µl of 10% APS while stirring 4.2. At last, add 16.7 µl TEMED and mix quickly. Note: APS and TEMED are highly reactive. Therefore, we should always add them last, just seconds before pouring the liquid into the glass plates (keep stirring).

steps.title: Immediately pour the gel solution between...
steps.instruction: Immediately pour the gel solution between gel plates (polymerisation begins within seconds) 5.

steps.title: Insert the comb carefully to form wells
steps.instruction: Insert the comb carefully to form wells. 5.

steps.title: Allow the gel to polymerise (approximately...
steps.instruction: Allow the gel to polymerise (approximately 30-35 min) at room temperature. 5.

steps.title: Remove the comb once the gel is fully solidified
steps.instruction: Remove the comb once the gel is fully solidified. 5.

steps.title: Rinse wells gently with buffer using...
steps.instruction: Rinse wells gently with buffer using a pipette to remove trapped air bubbles.

steps.title: Pre-run the gel (without samples) in...
steps.instruction: Pre-run the gel (without samples) in 1X TBE at 120 V for 5 minutes. 6.

steps.title: Run the gel at 120 V...
steps.instruction: Run the gel at 120 V until the dye front reaches the bottom or runs off the gel (around 50-55 min).

steps.title: Stain in a 0
steps.instruction: Stain in a 0.5% ethidium bromide solution for 15 min. 7.

steps.title: Rinse briefly with distilled water to enhance contrast
steps.instruction: Rinse briefly with distilled water to enhance contrast. 7.

steps.title: Visualise the gel under a UV transilluminator
steps.instruction: Visualise the gel under a UV transilluminator.
